scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rmr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rmr/db build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @rmr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rmr/db build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test:regressions: pnpm --filter @rmr/shared build && pnpm --filter @rmr/db build && node --import tsx --test src/regression.test.ts
